response.overview: After being released from prison for a crime he never committed, Sagar hopes to start a new life. But his past refuses to let go. Freddy—the very man responsible for putting him behind bars—returns with a dangerous task that could finally set Sagar free or drag him deeper into chaos.  With a relentless police officer closing in and secrets unfolding at every turn, Sagar must decide who to trust and how far he's willing to go to reclaim his life.
response.tagline: One task. One chance. No way out
response.title: Rail
